data.title: What's Going On With Charles River, Certara, Simulations Plus Stocks On Friday?
data.description: FDA introduces a new roadmap to reduce animal testing in monoclonal antibody development using AI models, organoid testing and real-world data to enhance safety and efficiency.

data.title: Joe Rogan Disagrees With Commerce Secretary Lutnick's Controversial Social Security Take—'If You Miss A Month, That's A Big F*cking Deal'
Fed's Kashkari Flags Waning Confidence: US 'No Longer Is The Most Attractive' To Global Capital
data.description: Minneapolis Federal Reserve President Neel Kashkari has raised concerns that investor sentiment may be shifting away from the U.S. Kashkari cites unusual market movements amid ongoing trade tensions.

data.title: Stellantis Q1 Shipments Decline 9%, but Gains in South America and EU Offer Relief
data.description: Stellantis (STLA) shares down on 9% decline in Q1 shipments due to lower production in NA and Europe. New models launched and normalized inventory.

data.title: Why Is Renewable Energy Provider Ocean Power Technologies Stock Rising Today?
data.description: Ocean Power Technologies (NYSE: OPTT) announced a strategic partnership with Elektron SAS, enhancing its Latin American presence. The $4 million agreement covers OPT's  maritime tech, including AI-powered and unmanned ocean systems.
